# AppLibrary.ExceptionRequest.Status

**Enumeration**

The possible statuses of an exception request for an app.

## Declaration

```swift
enum Status
```

## Overview

The [doc://com.apple.MarketplaceKit/documentation/MarketplaceKit/AppLibrary/ExceptionRequest] structure’s [doc://com.apple.MarketplaceKit/documentation/MarketplaceKit/AppLibrary/ExceptionRequest/status-swift.property] property is of this type.

## Determining the status

- **AppLibrary.ExceptionRequest.Status.approved**: A status that indicates the parent or guardian allows a specific app installation.
- **AppLibrary.ExceptionRequest.Status.declined**: A status that indicates the parent or guardian disallows a specific app installation.
- **AppLibrary.ExceptionRequest.Status.pending**: A status that indicates an app installation awaits the decision of a parent or guardian.

## Inspecting the request status

- **status**: A status that indicates the parent or guardian’s decision for the request.

## Conforms To

- Copyable
- Decodable
- Encodable
- Equatable
- Escapable
- Hashable
- RawRepresentable
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
